name: Kotlin Lsp
description: Kotlin language server for Claude Code, providing code intelligence, refactoring, and analysis.
longDescription: Wires JetBrains' official Kotlin language server into Claude Code for `.kt` and `.kts` files, adding code intelligence, refactoring, and analysis on top of plain-text editing. Requires the Kotlin LSP CLI — install with `brew install JetBrains/utils/kotlin-lsp`. No configuration needed beyond the plugin and the server binary.
